feedback_text: My role continues to challenge me in positive ways. I have autonomy over my projects and the leadership team genuinely listens to feedback from all levels.
I am satisfied with my current position but feel somewhat stagnant. I would like more challenging assignments or opportunities to learn adjacent skills.
